components.value: V, S, M (a vial of acid worth 10 gp)

saving_throw.value: Reflex partial (see text); against the spell (a second Reflex save on the creature’s turn negates this additional damage). description.value: A spray of acid erupts from your outstretched hand, dealing 1d6 points of acid damage per caster level (maximum 15d6) to each creature within its area ( Reflex half).
